holdings.infoBox: NASA is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rocket Lab stock at 11.66%, EchoStar at 8.67%, Spacex Spv Exposure (Common) at 8.00%, AST SpaceMobile at 6.19%, and Intuitive Machines at 5.83%.

overview.description: The Tema Space Innovators ETF (NASA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in companies positioned to benefit from the growth of the commercial space economy, including firms involved in satellite communications, launch systems, and related technologies. NASA was launched on Mar 30, 2026 and is issued by Tema.
